nasb.text: The man went into the land of the Hittites and built a city and named it Luz which is its name to this day.

esv.text: And the man went to the land of the Hittites and built a city and called its name Luz. That is its name to this day.

cnv.text: 那人到赫人之地去了，築了一座城，給它起名叫路斯；直到今日那城還叫這名。

ccb.text: 后来，那人搬到赫人的地方，筑了一座城，称之为路斯，沿用至今。
